surfaces_inspected.current_state: redirects identically — index is a placeholder shell
active — 10× service-termination announcement cards in dark panel

historical_surface.title: CHAI - 차이나는 간편결제
historical_surface.note: Hero copy retained as factual reference (linguistic pattern), not adopted as design copy.

layout_observations: Webflow-class-driven (no :root --tokens) — 73 utility class names use ink + brand palette
Section paddings in em (5em 2.5em) for full-bleed feel; card padding in px (35px)
Two display families coexist: ChaiGothic for Korean, Gotham for Western — language-switched stack
Active-tab indicator is inset bottom box-shadow not border (no reflow on activation)
Pink → purple hover flip is the primary motion language; no transform tokens beyond color easing
tone_observed: Loud, magenta-on-black, slogan-driven — early-2020s Korean fintech 'simple-payment' marketing maximalism. Wordplay '차이' (= 'difference' in Korean) anchors every headline.
